stdout:
## Issue success criteria
- ✅ External toolchain + `proofs/` scaffolding present (`proofs/lean-toolchain`, `proofs/lakefile.lean`, `scripts/verify-lean.sh`).
- ✅ Explicit Mathlib dependency now present (`proofs/lakefile.lean` L8–L10).
- ✅ Pipeline wiring present in CI (`.github/workflows/ci.yml` L152–L163 runs `./scripts/verify-lean.sh` and checks generated-file drift).
- ✅ `gfp`/`gfpn` extraction evidence present in generated Lean (`proofs/Gf2Core/Types.lean` L114, L152–L156; `proofs/Gf2Core/Funs.lean` includes `gfpn.cubic`/`gfpn.quadratic` items).
- ✅ Const-generic risk gate documented as working (`proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md` L55–L57).
- ⚠️ Success criterion "`lake build` compiles generated code" is evidenced for commit `71c47eb` via gate run (`.jit/gate-runs/7c5.../result.json`), but not re-verified on current `HEAD` in this review run.

## No technical debt
- ❌ Remaining doc/process debt: toolchain source of truth is inconsistent (`dev/lean4-verification-pipeline.md` states patched/local Charon base `24a17b5e` at L42–L45, while `proofs/README.md` and CI still pin `1a659e67` at README L29–L30 and CI L132–L133).
- ❌ Internal inconsistency in script commentary: `scripts/verify-lean.sh` comment says “only gfp transparent” (L22), while command/config and docs target both `gfp` and `gfpn`.

## Separation of concerns
- ✅ No evidence of `gf2-core -> gf2-coding` dependency inversion; review-relevant changes are docs/workflow/proofs infra, not crate dependency wiring.

## Functional paradigm and performance
- ✅ No hot-path Rust math/kernel changes in reviewed delta; no observed regression risk to functional-style API or kernel performance conventions.

## Correctness (tail masking, bit numbering, field axioms)
- ✅ No `BitVec`/GF(2) core mutator code changed in this reviewed delta, so tail-masking/bit-indexing invariants are not directly altered.
- ⚠️ Formal-verification claims improved and now mostly aligned on `gfpn`, but the toolchain-version inconsistency above weakens reproducibility confidence.

## Testing
- ❌ I could not execute required local validations (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo test`, `lake build`) due environment permission errors: “Permission denied and could not request permission from user.”
- ❌ No GitHub Actions run exists for branch `formal-verification` to substitute for missing local execution (`list_workflow_runs` for CI on this branch returned `total_count: 0`).
- ❌ Given the gate requirement “No test or lint failures (including pre-existing),” this review cannot certify compliance.

## Unsafe isolation
- ✅ No reviewed-file evidence of newly introduced Rust `unsafe`; changed files are Lean/docs/workflow/script oriented.

## Documentation
- ✅ Prior contradictions called out in the most recent failed review were addressed: `proofs/README.md` now includes `gfpn` (L13–L15), `proofs/WORKAROUNDS.md` now marks `gfpn` extracted/verified (L40–L45), and `proofs/lakefile.lean` now declares Mathlib.
- ❌ However, documentation set is still not fully coherent on the Charon pin/source-of-truth and script comments (see technical debt findings).

## Prior review feedback (most recent run)
- ✅ Fixed: explicit Mathlib declaration in `lakefile.lean`.
- ✅ Fixed: `gfpn` status contradiction across `README`/`WORKAROUNDS`.
- ❌ Unresolved/new blocker for acceptance remains: inability to establish clean lint/test/build status for current head revision in this review environment.

## Jit issue dependencies
- ✅ `issue.dependencies` is empty; no prerequisite blockage.

VERDICT: FAIL
---
Gate result: FAILED
